summary: Nurse-led preoperative education reduces patient anxiety through improved understanding and active participation, while also lowering postoperative complication risks via enhanced early symptom identification and compliance with treatment plans. The available evidence strongly supports its efficacy in improving both psychological and physical recovery after cardiac surgery.
